response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ year experience requirement with 11+ years of full-stack development across the core tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB). Demonstrates strong software engineering practices through TDD, CI/CD, and architectural expertise. Current role includes direct AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development—a required technical skill. Primary gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js exposure and unconfirmed experience with specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright), but strong fundamentals suggest quick onboarding.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 11+ years of full-stack development and proven expertise across entire primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB)
Direct AI agent infrastructure and MCP development experience in current Staff Engineer role—a required skill that's difficult to find in the market
Demonstrates software craftsmanship excellence through TDD practices, CI/CD expertise, and successful architecture of high-scale systems (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js framework experience listed despite it being the primary backend framework; would require framework-specific onboarding
Testing framework specifics (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned; while strong testing background is evident, framework familiarity is uncertain
Cloud platform experience limited to AWS CDK; no explicit mention of GCP or Azure experience

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP framework experience
Nest.js and specific testing framework gaps
